summary: Testing of P1 (Withdrawal history real-time) and P2 (Real-time messaging) features. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend pages load correctly. WebSocket works internally but external WSS connection returns 502 (infrastructure issue). React Native Web button clicks not working via Playwright (known limitation).

integration_issues.issue: WSS connection via external URL returns HTTP 502 - works internally on localhost:8001. Infrastructure/ingress configuration issue

action_items: INFRASTRUCTURE: WebSocket (WSS) external connections return 502 - check Kubernetes ingress WebSocket upgrade configuration
Add data-testid attributes to more interactive elements (tabs, buttons) for better testability
Withdrawal-history page shows 'DJ non trouvé' when auth state not properly loaded - consider localStorage auth restoration on page mount
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring structure created in /app/backend/routes/ and /app/backend/models/ - currently placeholder files, logic remains in server.py
WebSocket implementation in server.py is correct - ping/pong works locally
Withdrawal history page uses useAuthStore which may not restore from localStorage on direct URL navigation
Real-time button on wallet page correctly placed in Retraits tab (lines 238-244 in wallet.tsx)

success_rate.frontend: Pages load correctly, button interaction limited by React Native Web/Playwright compatibility

seed_data_creation: Created DJ profile for test user reset-test@djbooking.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1/P2 features implemented. WebSocket works internally (localhost:8001) but external WSS connections fail with 502. Backend APIs all working. React Native Web UI testing is limited - TouchableOpacity clicks don't work via Playwright. Use direct URL navigation and API testing. Test user has DJ profile now.

P1_withdrawal_history_page.note: Page shows 'DJ non trouvé' when auth not loaded via React state

websocket_testing.internal_test: PASSED - ws://localhost:8001/ws/{user_id} works correctly with ping/pong
websocket_testing.root_cause: Likely Kubernetes ingress WebSocket upgrade configuration issue

mocked_apis.email_sending: Password reset email is mocked - token returned in API response
